2606.22878.title: Priority-Aware Learning-Unlearning Correction for Dynamic Decentralized LoRA Fine-Tuning
2606.22878.paper_summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed at the network edge to provide pervasive generative AI services, decentralized federated learning (DFL) provides a vital mechanism for privacy-preserving, domain-specific fine-tuning through peer-to-peer exchanges of parameter-efficient updates. However, the dynamic nature of practical decentralized edge networks, where devices may dynamically join or leave the collaborative training process, requires the system to continuously adapt to new data while selectively removing prior contributions. This correction process remains a significant bottleneck, as individual device updates become deeply entangled within the global fine-tuned parameters. To address this challenge, we propose a priority-aware learning-unlearning correction framework based on orthogonal LoRA that can enhance the knowledge evaluation through topology adjustment. Specifically, we first design an orthogonal LoRA mechanism that yields post-training contribution coordinates, enabling history-free projection addition and deletion in response to membership changes. We then analyze the correction bottleneck and develop a priority-aware policy that selects among topology refinement, local correction, proximal damping, and synchronization scheduling according to the dominant residual term. A resource allocation algorithm is further developed to allocate limited communication across layer groups, prioritizing the primary bottlenecks within per-round wireless constraints. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves robust post-event correction for both device join and leave events and validate that different residual regimes necessitate distinct correction actions.
2606.22878.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地在網絡邊緣部署，以提供普遍的生成式人工智慧服務，去中心化聯邦學習（DFL）為通過點對點交換參數高效更新來實現隱私保護的特定領域微調提供了一個重要機制。<lb/>然而，實際去中心化邊緣網絡的動態特性，使得設備可能會動態地加入或離開協作訓練過程，這要求系統必須不斷適應新數據，同時選擇性地移除先前的貢獻。<lb/>這一修正過程仍然是一個重要的瓶頸，因為單個設備的更新與全局微調參數深度糾纏在一起。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種基於正交LoRA的優先級感知學習-遺忘修正框架，該框架可以通過拓撲調整來增強知識評估。<lb/>具體而言，我們首先設計了一種正交LoRA機制，產生訓練後的貢獻坐標，從而能夠在響應成員變更時進行無歷史的投影添加和刪除。<lb/>然後，我們分析了修正瓶頸，並根據主導殘差項開發了一種優先級感知策略，該策略在拓撲精煉、本地修正、近端阻尼和同步調度之間進行選擇。<lb/>進一步開發了一種資源分配算法，以在層組之間分配有限的通信，優先考慮每輪無線限制內的主要瓶頸。<lb/>實驗表明，所提出的框架對於設備加入和離開事件都實現了穩健的事件後修正，並驗證了不同的殘差狀態需要不同的修正行動。
2606.22878.author: Nuocheng Yang et.al.
2606.22878.authors: Nuocheng Yang, Yechen He, Sihua Wang, Zihan Chen, Tony Q. S. Quek, Changchuan Yin
